basics.name: Ethan Chee
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am studying for a B.S. in Computer Engineering in the College of Engineering at the University of Hawaii. I expect to graduate in Fall, 2022.

education.institution: University of Hawaii at Mānoa, Honolulu, HI

work.summary: Learning Assistant for the course CHEM 162: General Chemistry II. Leading a recitation class and assisting the students during office hours.
Teaching Assistant for the course EE 160: Programming for Engineers. Leading the lab portion of the course.

volunteer.summary: Peer mentor for the incoming freshman into the University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa
Participated in cleanups around the island, including beaches and parks.
Helped setup for the ECUH VEX Robotics Tournament and was part of the robot inspection team and referee during tournament matches.

awards.title: University of Hawaii at Mānoa Dean's List

awards.summary: Honors awarded during graduation for the completion of two AP courses with four years of math and science (academic), completion of the STEM pathway (STEM), and completion of a capstone project (CTE).
